name: krx-live-chart
description: KRX Live Chart (CheeseStock) - Korean stock market charting web app

scripts.deploy: python scripts/stage_deploy.py && wrangler pages deploy deploy --project-name cheesestock --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message="deploy"
scripts.deploy:bundled: node scripts/build.mjs --minify --obfuscate && python scripts/stage_deploy.py --bundled && wrangler pages deploy deploy --project-name cheesestock --branch main --commit-dirty=true --commit-message="deploy bundled"
